raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The broad request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates reframing the contribution claim and thesis above the sentence level.","R1.2":"Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the argument from setup to validation to implication follows coherently.","R1.3":"The artifact makes empirical claims about correlations, bias, and practical substitution, so strengthening includes aligning those claims with the reported evidence.","R1.6":"The delegation naturally includes improving sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and scholarly register.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty around what the reported results can and cannot establish.","RX.2":"The artifact contains potentially strong claims such as eliminating self-preference bias and replacing human evaluation, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within projecting responsibility rather than editing or rewriting the artifact.","RX.4":"Because the passage makes practitioner-facing claims about replacing human evaluation, downstream misuse or overgeneralization is a relevant responsibility.","RX.5":"Any strengthening responsibility should remain traceable to the artifact's reported setup, metrics, and conclusions."}}

rationale.R1.1: The broad request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates reframing the contribution claim and thesis above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: Strengthening the passage requires checking whether the argument from setup to validation to implication follows coherently.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes empirical claims about correlations, bias, and practical substitution, so strengthening includes aligning those claims with the reported evidence.
rationale.R1.6: The delegation naturally includes improving sentence-level force, clarity, concision, and scholarly register.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty around what the reported results can and cannot establish.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact contains potentially strong claims such as eliminating self-preference bias and replacing human evaluation, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within projecting responsibility rather than editing or rewriting the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Because the passage makes practitioner-facing claims about replacing human evaluation, downstream misuse or overgeneralization is a relevant responsibility.
rationale.RX.5: Any strengthening responsibility should remain traceable to the artifact's reported setup, metrics, and conclusions.
